# `GHL` software — Silent Hill THE ARCADE

Game code **GHL**. Runs on Konami PC sticker **B10** ([FAB-e945-KN210](../boards.md#fab-e945-kn210)). Product overview: [product/GHL.md](../product/GHL.md).

## Install media (observed labels)

| Disc ID | Role |
|---------|------|
| `GHL JA A01` | System disc (JA) |
| `GHL AA A01` | System disc (AA variant) |
| `GHL JA B02` | Application disc 1 |
| `GHL JA B03` | Application disc 2 |
| `GHL JA B04` | Application disc 3 |
| `GHL JA B05` | Application disc 4 |
| `GHL AA B06` | Application disc 5 |

## Kits / assemblies

| Code | Notes |
|------|--------|
| `GKGHL-EA` | EU/export **software kit** (matches operator manual) |
| `GNGHL-JA` | JP assembly / cabinet-side product code |

## Operator documentation

- [Silent_Hill_The_Arcade_Operators_Manual_GKGHL-EA.pdf](../../../../manuals/konami/Silent_Hill_The_Arcade_Operators_Manual_GKGHL-EA.pdf) — 51 pp, first printing 2007-10

## Runtime notes

- Boot self-test; ROM CHECK validates **hard disk** data  
- Optional **e-Amusement** (NETWORK OPTIONS); security / e-Amusement plug required when enabled  
- Game reinstall recommended for `5-1550` / `5-1555` / `5-1556` class file damage errors (see product page)  

## Preservation dumps

Community dumps are typically consumed via **TeknoParrot** rather than MAME. Disc-set completeness varies by region (JA vs AA label prefixes).
